name: shop_no_ads_premium
description: Premium bundle badge composed like a shop hero: the crossed-out "ADS" burst badge sits behind and to the upper right; overlapping it in front on the lower left is the game's hint token (glass lightbulb with golden star spark and green screw base) with chunky gold-outlined "5x" lettering across its lower edge. The words "ADS" and "5x" are the requested text.
prompt_extra: two-element overlap composition, hint token in front reads largest; same badge design language as the standard no-ads badge

variants.name: warm
variants.prompt_extra: slightly warmer, richer gold tones and a touch more ornament

variants.name: clean
variants.prompt_extra: slightly cooler, simpler and more minimal composition
